title: Squirrel Removal in Inwood, NYC | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Inwood, NYC. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving Inwood homes and businesses. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Inwood, where these agile rodents frequently invade attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in the neighborhood's diverse housing stock. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services tailored to Inwood's unique residential landscape, from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family homes near Inwood Hill Park. Our humane removal methods ensure your property is squirrel-free while preventing future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Inwood residents for years with fast, reliable squirrel removal that prioritizes safety and long-term results. Our licensed technicians understand the specific challenges posed by Inwood's tree-lined streets and older building structures, delivering customized solutions that protect your home and family.
localContext: Inwood's proximity to Inwood Hill Park and the abundance of mature trees throughout the neighborhood create an ideal habitat for squirrels, leading to frequent wildlife conflicts in residential areas. The area's mix of historic walk-ups, Tudor-style homes, and garden apartments along Seaman Avenue and Dyckman Street require specialized exclusion techniques to keep squirrels out permanently.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Inwood typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Inwood home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring, insulation, and wooden structures. They also create fire hazards and can introduce parasites and diseases into your home. Prompt removal is essential to prevent costly repairs.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Inwood property?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Inwood are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the situation. We offer same-day emergency services and can typically schedule an initial inspection within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Do you use humane squirrel removal methods?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use humane, live-capture techniques and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit safely without re-entry. All our methods comply with NYC wildlife regulations and prioritize the safety of both your family and the animals.
